UserService/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
UserService/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.general_idea: Migrate from deprecated HttpSecurity.authorize() to authorizeHttpRequests() lambda DSL.
UserService/src/main/java/com/broker/use.why_exists: The authorize() method is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6.0 (required for Spring Boot 3.x / JDK 21).
